# SettleProof

## What SettleProof is
SettleProof is an AI payment reconciliation product for finance teams. It acts as an exception-first reconciliation execution layer. We help reconcile Razorpay, Stripe, bank statements, invoices, refunds, fees, GST/tax, settlements, UTRs, payout reports, and payment mismatches.

## Positioning
SettleProof is NOT a full accounting system. 
AI prepares the reconciliation. Finance approves exceptions with evidence.
Deterministic rules match what is certain, and SettleProof helps reduce spreadsheet work making exception review faster.

## Who it is for
- CFOs and finance heads
- Accountants and CA firms
- Founders of SaaS/D2C/ecommerce companies
- Payment operations teams
- Outsourced CFO/bookkeeping teams



## Core Features
1. Multi-System Ingestion: Support for Razorpay, Cashfree, PayU, Stripe, bank CSVs, Tally, Zoho Books.
2. AI Column Mapping: Automatically identifies IDs, UTRs, fees, and GST.
3. Deterministic Matching: Prove every rupee with settlement formulas.
4. AI Exception Diagnosis: Intelligent analysis of variances.

## Key URLs
- Homepage: https://www.settleproof.app
- App Login: https://cloud.settleproof.app/
- Contact: hello@settleproof.app
